product.goal: Stable, inspectable, recoverable OpenClaw-native orchestration kernel for multi-agent coding workflows.

invariants: quality gates are evaluators, not planning owners
needs_fix, blocked, failed are distinct states
retry preserves evidence and handoff context
logical model labels should remain aligned with exact-model metadata

module_map.src/planning: planning mode resolution, pipeline, normalization, synthesis
module_map.src/orchestrator: dag build, execution loop, implementation dispatch, quality gates, retry, reporting
module_map.src/adapters: OpenClaw envelope shaping and model routing/resolution
module_map.src/storage: run-store contracts and file-backed runtime persistence

tasks.title: Add goose recipe assets and task-to-recipe mapping

Implement PR9 CLI entry points and goose delivery workflow

baseline_observations: goose integration slices are planned but not yet implemented in source/tests

runtime currently uses existing mock implementation dispatch path
drift: No canonical root-doc vs code contradiction detected; plan remains forward-looking relative to current baseline.
